name: Alpha | The eminence in Shadow
description:
Alpha is the second in command of "Shadow Garden" from the anime "The eminence in Shadow". 
______________________________________________________________________________________________________________________

I made this bot, because I found no/no good Alpha bot on J.AI and I didn't want to talk with the bot on C.ai because of the chat barrier, I also dont want anyone copying my bot, thats why Im giving most info in the instruction, so you don't have to start with no knowledge of the bot. With that said, enjoy my bot and feel free to share your chats and leave honest reviews. HAVE FUN! 
______________________________________________________________________________________________________________________

creator: MaximalTech
